sourcesContent:
arr = [1, 2, 3, 4]
obj = {a: 1, b: 2}
t = 0
for x in arr when x > 1 by 2
  t += x
for x in arr by 2 when x > 1
  t += x
for x in arr by 2
  t += x
for x, i in arr when x
  t += i
for k, v of obj when v > 0
  t += v
for own k, v of obj when k
  t += 1
for own k, v of obj
  t += 1
for x in arr when x > 2
  t += x
# LITERAL negative steps walk DOWN from the end (`by -1` is the
# descending `_i--` loop; other negatives step by their amount).
# Non-literal steps evaluate once into a runtime-sign header and live
# OUTSIDE this byte corpus (an ascending header
# never terminates when the step is negative at runtime).
for x in arr by -1
  t += x
for x in arr by -2
  t += x
for x, i in arr by -1
  t += x + i
